calendar.matters:
Petition By Successor Trustee For Order Directing Transfer Of Real Property
Off Calendar Nov-27-2012 Off Calendar

Petition By Successor Trustee For Order Directing Transfer Of Real Property
Off Calendar Sep-25-2012 Continued To Nov-27-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Erika Yuen for and with Mark Chow (Successor Trustee). Steven Strain for and with David Chow (Respondent). Kin Chi Chow (Grantor) and his Spouse were also present.

Ms. Yuen stated that Respondent tracked down the Grantor's Wife and handed her a grant deed transferring the building from himself as Trustee to the current Trustee. Ms. Yuen also requested leave to amend the petition and asked for Respondent's address for service. The Parties stipulated to Ms. Yuen filing an amended petition. Mr. Strain and Mr. Chow stipulated that any service on the Lawyer (Steven Strain) is service on David Chow. The Petition by Successor Trustee for Order Directing Transfer of Real Property was continued to November 27, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Ruiz.
